summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of auth flow and character creation. All core features working correctly including Login/Register tabs, user creation, character creation with templates/traits, mode selection with low-poly SVG preview, and proper navigation between First Person (/play) and Story Mode (/village).

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 404 Not Found when trying to get character conversations
minor_bugs.impact: Conversations history not accessible, but doesn't block main auth flow

passed_tests: Auth page loads at /auth with Login/Register tabs
Register creates new user and redirects to character creation
Character creation form with background templates, trait selection, and validation
Mode selection displays character with low-poly SVG preview
First Person mode button correctly navigates to /play
Story Mode button correctly navigates to /village
Login finds existing user and redirects to appropriate page
Complete user registration → character creation → mode selection flow
Backend API endpoints working (95.2% success rate in backend tests)
